zh.lifeSummary: 當Egas Gomes Guedão於大約1140年出生在葡萄牙時，他的父親Gome Mendes Guedes71歲，母親Urraca Henriques de Portocarreiro21歲。他與Urraca Vázquez de Ambia在葡萄牙結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1183年在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在葡萄牙。

nameMeanings.name: Gomes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Fernando, Luis, Francisco, Jorge, Mario, Domingos, Jaime, Julio, Luiz.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Catarina, Henrique, Agostinho, Amadeu, Ademir, Aderito, Aloisio, Conceicao, Ilidio.

Portuguese and Galician: from the medieval personal name Gomes, probably Visigothic in origin, from guma ‘man’. This surname is also found on the west coast of India, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.

variants.name: Gomez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Miguel, Pedro, Jorge, Ramon, Rafael.
Spanish (Gómez): from a medieval personal name, probably of Visigothic origin, from guma ‘man’. Compare De Gomez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some Jewish descendants retained the surname that their families had adopted as Roman Catholics.

nameMeanings.name: Egas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of   Aogán   or a transferred use of the surname, which has the same origin.

en.lifeSummary: When Egas Gomes Guedão was born about 1140, in Portugal, his father, Gome Mendes Guedes, was 71 and his mother, Urraca Henriques de Portocarreiro, was 21. He married Urraca Vázquez de Ambia in Portugal. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1183, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egas Gomes Guedão est né environ 1140, à Portugal, son père, Gome Mendes Guedes, avait 71 ans et sa mère, Urraca Henriques de Portocarreiro, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Urraca Vázquez de Ambia à Portugal. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1183, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Portugal.

de.Ambía, Baños de Molgas, Orenze, Galicia,: Ambía, Baños de Molgas, Ourense, Galicia, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Egas Gomes Guedão um 1140 in Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gome Mendes Guedes 71 und seine Mutter Urraca Henriques de Portocarreiro 21. Er hat in Portugal Urraca Vázquez de Ambia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1183 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egas Gomes Guedão è nato il circa 1140 nel Portogallo, il suo padre, Gome Mendes Guedes, aveva 71 anni e il suo madre, Urraca Henriques de Portocarreiro, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Urraca Vázquez de Ambia nel Portogallo. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1183, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Egas Gomes Guedãoが約1140年にポルトガルで生まれた時，父Gome Mendes Guedesは71歳，母Urraca Henriques de Portocarreiroは21歳であった。ポルトガルでUrraca Vázquez de Ambiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1183年に故郷で45歳で死去し，ポルトガルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Egas Gomes Guedão(이)가 대략 1140년 포르투갈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gome Mendes Guedes(은)는 71세였고, 그의 어머니 Urraca Henriques de Portocarreiro(은)는 21세였다. 그는 포르투갈에서 Urraca Vázquez de Ambia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1183년 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egas Gomes Guedão nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Portugal, seu pai, Gome Mendes Guedes, tinha 71 anos e sua mãe, Urraca Henriques de Portocarreiro, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Urraca Vázquez de Ambia em Portugal. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1183, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egas Gomes Guedão родился около 1140 г. в местности Португалия, его отцу по имени Gome Mendes Guedes было 71 год, а матери, которую звали Urraca Henriques de Portocarreiro, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Urraca Vázquez de Ambia в местности Португалия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1183 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности Португалия.

Se casó con Urraca Vázquez de Ambia en Portugal. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1183, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Portugal.
